title: dinebra srilankensis
intro: Dinebra srilankensis is a rare and endangered plant species native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dinebra srilankensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Dinebra srilankensis typically involve drying and grinding the leaves, which are then used to make teas, infusions, or powders for medicinal purposes.
